game.short_text: Doth he not leave the ninety and nine?
game.title: The Good Shepherd

details.title: The Good Shepherd
details.description:
"How think ye? if a man have an hundred sheep, and one of them be gone astray, doth he not leave the ninety and nine, and goeth into the mountains, and seeketh that which is gone astray?
in The Good Shepherd you play as the Shepherd on a quest to rescue the one sheep who has strayed from the herd. the forest is known to house many unsightly creatures, but a Good Shepherd would leave no sheep behind.

*warning* this game contains many moving colors and lights
If there is anything unclear while playing, press H to open the help page.
gameplay:
The Good Shepherd is a short turn-based game made for Acerola Jam 0 about resisting temptation, repenting from sin, and knowing when to strike. 
combat consists of three phases:
1. lots phase - The Shepherd plays lots to determine His fate in combat.
 - red lots - determine the damage The Shepherd can do.
- blue lots - determine the defense The Shepherd can put up.
- black lots - 3 black lots give The Shepherd a random sin.
- white lots - determine the amount of health The Shepherd can heal with petition, or if 3 are collected, allow the Shepherd to purify a sin with petition.
2. action phase - all combatants choose their actions for the upcoming Turn Phase.
3. turn phase - selected actions are played out.
along the journey, The Shepherd may give in to temptation and embrace sins with various detrimental effects, but with the gifts of God, The Shepherd can repent.1. Download the zip
2. Extract the zip
3. Run "The Good Shepherd.exe"

THE STRUCTURE MAINTENANCE IS SCHEDULED FOR 05.04.73

game.short_text: Explore an Aberrant and Shifting Dimension
game.title: Shiftscape

details.title: Shiftscape
details.description:
Play as a researcher who has to explore and survive a shifting landscape of puzzles after some multidimensional travel goes haywire.

Controls (explained in game):
Movement: WASD or Arrow Keys
Hints/Solutions: Hold H (revealed from the start of the level to the end)
Restart Level: R
Pause Game: Esc
Accept/Interact: Z


This is a game made for the Acerola Jam 0. A lot of functionality,  art, gameplay, and polish could not be included, but I am proud of the  results. It was made in 14 days with only one month's worth of game  development experience, so I hope you enjoy! Feedback is greatly  appreciated.
    
I plan to continue development of this game. If you are interested in  receiving updates or following my progress, you can follow me on  itch.io or message me on discord (discord username dragonsproutling). I will make a own dedicated discord server  if enough people are interested.
    
All assets, music, and sounds are made by me. Please do not  redistribute without my expressed consent. The font is m5x7 by Daniel  Linssen.
    
This game runs for windows. A browser version was released for playtesting on Acerola's discord if you want to find the link for that (less functionality and more bugs, but it has the same vibes and overall gameplay).

game.title: Ronin Anomaly
game.short_text: Brave Ronin, with his lone soul, steps into the anomaly world.

details.title: Ronin Anomaly
details.description:
### Ronin Anomaly
 #### Story: In "Ronin," our protagonist, named "Brave Soul," embodies a combination of power and confidence as he seeks revenge against a promise that has led his enemies astray. Along his path, obstacles arise, compelling him to harness his abilities to their fullest to reach his goal.
 #### Features: - Gravity Manipulation: One of the primary features of this game is the ability to manipulate gravity, allowing "Brave Soul" to move in three different dimensions and overcome obstacles. - Complex Levels: The game includes challenging and intricate levels that require smart use of gravity manipulation and "Brave Soul's" abilities. 
- Narrative Evolution: As players progress, the story evolves into a more complex narrative, with "Brave Soul" encountering new challenges and characters. - Engaging Visual Experience: With stunning graphics and captivating environment designs, players will immerse themselves in a visually breathtaking experience.
 #### Game Objective: The main objective of "Ronin" is to seek revenge against a promise that has led his enemies astray. By confronting obstacles and various characters, the aim is to achieve this goal. You can experience the game's thrilling features and captivating story alone or with your friends.

In this 30 day research activity, you will make full use of our state-of-the-art Facility Access Terminal (patent pending) to interact with Aberration class Entity E-891 in complete safety.
Follow all instructions accurately and promptly to maintain a safe and productive research environment. S.O.U.P. Incorporated thanks you for your contribution to the continued survival and success of humankind.
This game was made in 14 days for Acerola Jam 0

This Game Includes:

game.title: Grab Box
game.short_text: grabbing is the new pushing

details.title: Grab Box
details.description:
A box-pushing game where you can grab onto boxes, with the story of an inexperienced game developer learning to live with bugs mistakes. Despite such a simple premise, things go slightly off the rails.
Initially made for Acerola Jam 0, with the theme "Aberration".
Arrow Keys / WASD (or the equivalent for your keyboard layout) to move
Other controls are onscreen in the game

This was heavily inspired by Hempuli's recent series of tiny block pushers (https://itch.io/c/4014684/tiny-block-pushers).Additionally, the grabbing mechanic is pretty much stolen from the upcoming game Lab Rat (Go play the demo if it's still available, because it's amazing)
Jam Version playtested by Gorglomux and Idolon

MEGACHESS is a chess-based roguelike dungeon crawler. Dive across 3 areas with more than a 40 hand crafted levels, and conquer the dungeon with 7 different classes and their unique ability. 
Dive fast and gather gold for sacrifices, or play carefully and capture powerful units to improve your army, in order to defeat the forgotten Black King.

Also come with unique pieces, buffs and effects, powerful passives....

game.short_text: A retro shroomer-shooter.
game.title: The Color of The Room

details.title: The Color of The Room
details.description:
'You wake up to a quiet house, walk downstairs and find the table already set for breakfast. An omelet sits at the head of the table, your partner must have made it. You sit down and look at the omelet stuffed with cheese, onions, peppers, and mushrooms. You weren't the biggest fan of mushrooms, but you ate the omelet anyways, because you were hungry. However, when you looked up from the table something was wrong. It was...'
The Color of The Room is a retro Doom-like shooter where you have to split your time between two dimensions all fit within one room. Neither room is safe from the mushrooms. You have to manage your spores which act as ammo, health, and currency while you catch baby mushrooms and consume them to unlock their room bending effects.
Controls:
w,a,s,d = move
Right Mouse Button = Shoot (consumes spores)
Left Mouse Button = Seek through other rooms (consumes spores)
Space = Melee (heals you)
Shift = Heal (consumes spores)
E = Eat Baby Mushroom
Tab/Escape = Pause Menu
Credits:
Game by Gulliver Brower
Voices by: Kevin Malone, Kevin Peters, Harry Hobler

Songs by Siamese Goldfish: The Color of the Room, Brother Bring Me Near, Ove all from the Portrait With Oranges album
Special Thanks:
Eisen Brower, Aidan Hobler, and everyone else (you know who you are and you don't need an ego boost)Unzip the folder and run the 'Color-of-The-Room.exe' file
GitHub Repo

game.short_text: Farming Adventure game where the crops are a little weird.
game.title: Echo: Comet Coast (Jam Version)

details.title: Echo: Comet Coast (Jam Version)
details.description:
I'm making a full version of Echo: Comet Coast in 2025, there's a tiny Kickstarter if you're interested, pre-launch page is here
Echo: Comet Coast  (Jam Version) is a mix of Link's Awakening and Stardew Valley, It's a classic top-down Zelda experience where your key items are also crops you have to farm.
You awake on a mysterious island filled with colourful characters, dark forces have taken a special fruit from Mt Comet causing harvests to succumb to the Blight, crops that have been harmless for so long are starting to become monsters!You must embark on a quest to restore the Blissum Fruit to the summit and bring hope to the island once more.
Features:
10 crops to grow with several of them having special abilities, like the Grokey being used to unlock doors and the Bombshoot blowing things up!A dungeon with a few puzzles.Several small quest-like activities to complete.Roughly 1 hr of gameplay.
There's a controls page on the beach but interacting with it requires knowing the interact button (completely my fault!)
Controls
GamepadMove - Left Stick / D pad
Interact - A / Y
Use Selected Item - B / X
Toolbar Move - LB , RB
Pause Menu - Start

KeyboardMove - W,A,S,DInteract - K / ZUse Selected Item - J / XToolbar Move - Q , EPause Menu - Esc / Tab
Credits: Almost everything was made by me in the space of 2 weeks except for the fonts; The fonts were found on fontstruct, the Link's Awakening one is here, the 3x5 one is here
Thank you so much for checking it out!It's a zipped unity game, so unzip and open the executable.

game.short_text: A platformer with no jump? Absurd!
game.title: Anger Issues

details.title: Anger Issues
details.description:
It's a platformer with no jump button! Heresy, you think? Doesn't make sense? An aberration? Well I say screw the rules! I'm just as mad as the goblin protagonist you play in this game, and just as angry!!! A game submitted to the Acerola Jam 0, where the theme is aberration.
This game is about anger, explosions, madness, recklessness and intensity! You play as a very intense and angry goblin that can't walk. He's on a wheelchair but he doesn't need functioning legs to jump and run around. In fact, he can fly higher than any Italian plumber or blue hedgehog you might have heard of! Wanna see how he does it? Play the game!
It's filled to the brim with bombs, explosions, intense music and quotes about anger and channeling your emotions for good. It can get pretty challenging too, with tough platforming and even puzzles, in a sense. But what's important is that it's super fun!

As in the spirit of Acerola Jam 0 and mine own and pretty much every software I used to make this game, it's free and open source! You can see the repository here.
The game was made with the Godot engine and is licensed under MIT for its code and CC0 for its assets. I made all the assets except for the music and the font, but the music is also CC0, made by Juhani Junkala while the font is CC BY-ND 2.5, made by Nikos Giannakopoulos.

game.short_text: You're living a normal day like always... but what if it isn't as normal as you think?
game.title: Lamb

details.title: Lamb
details.description:
Just go to work.
Lamb is a first person text adventure game where you just woke up and is headed to work. You could just pick up your keys and leave the apartment, but is that really the right decision?
Text Based Gameplay
Most of the game's content is based on inspecting your surroundings and checking the different events that happen occasionally. Sometimes you might need to choose something, so be always prepared to write something as well.
First Person
Even though most of the game is text-based, you can explore your entire apartment in first person. Walk around and get to know your environment.
Visual Style
The game mimics old ASCII-based text adventure games, everything is rendered in the game's own font. Think of this game as a homage to the old times while also giving it some modern glow-ups.
********************************************************************************************
Submission to Acerola Jam 0
The game was made for the Acerola Jam 0. I'm a big fan of Acerola's Channel and when I heard that the game was supposed to be worked on alone I couldn't pass the oportunity. Everything in the game was made by myself: 3D, 2D, Font, Audio, Programming. I worked hard for this submission and I hope you guys enjoy it!
THE GAME IS OUT!!!
I hope you guys enjoy this short horror experience!
DISCLAIMER
After watching DuccW's stream playing my game it came to my attention how I goofed up the typing system. Mostly it was because I left it to be the last implemented system and didn't give it enough polish / thought. I want you guys to appreciate my game and not be frustrated by it, so here are a few tips on how to play while I work on a walkthrough:
"Take Item" is a good approach when prompted to grab / take / "would you like to get..." etc.
Typing the name of the object in question is the best way to select choices in the game. Eg.: "Knife" for "You could take a knife with you...", etc.
You are trying to stop a ritual, so pay attention to what is happening and try to find the things that might be involved with it. Most of the time burning and destroying are good ways of getting rid of rituals.

game.short_text: Kill Ghosts or Something
game.title: ABBY RAYSHINE

details.title: ABBY RAYSHINE
details.description:
Abby Rayshine (Ab - bee - Ray - shin) is just an ordinary high school girl. Well, except for the fact that she secretly fights ghosts with her psychic powers. One day however, the ghosts come to her and begin haunting her school! Normally she would just exorcise them all, but she can't do that while all her friends are watching, that would be so embarrassing! Help her find items and solve puzzles in order to clear the school so she can kill those dang ghosts in peace.

This game was made for Acerola's Acerola Jam 0. The main theme of the jam was the word "aberration", thus, Abby Rayshine, a girl who is afraid of being seen as an aberration. She also fights apparitions, which isn't the same word but it sounds kinda similar idk.Also apparently I need a Github version of this game so here you go.CONTROLSA - Move leftD - Move RightZ - Interact/ConfirmX - Menu/CancelSHIFT - SprintNEVER PRESS S(if you do press W or else you'll move very slowly)

CHARACTERS
Abby Rayshine
a anxiety ridden girl who is prone to anger due to her nature as a psychic. She comes from a long line of ghost hunters, which is, in her words, "so lame". Because of this, she has attempted to keep her powers hidden from her peers, though she just can't help but exorcise a ghost whenever she comes across one. Good thing only she and her weird family can see ghosts.
Amy Stake
Abby's best friend for life, though she is a bit of an empty-headed girl. Though she has witness Abby's escapades numerous times, she always shrugs it off as Abby having a panic attack (which isn't entirely incorrect). 
Brickford Walle
Brickford is the coolest kid in school, at least in his opinion. He wears shades indoors and gets detention on purpose, all in the name of fighting back against the system. He listens to a lot of Radio Head.
Justin Case
The classic nerd of the school, Justin is a guy who just LOVES to learn (obnoxiously). He'll often stand near other groups of students and wait for them to talk about something remotely related to math or science so he can interject with a fun fact. He's also running for class president, I hope he wins.
Arby Gene Baker
Much like Justin, Arby is an unapologetic nerd. However, his interests align more with indie games and niche SoundCloud artists. When he isn't socially reclusive, he'll try to share his favorite video game soundtracks with people, though he is often ignored as the types of videos games that he likes are not very mainstream, leaving him to feel like he is all alone in the world. What a dork.
Mike Hawkinsbig
Mike is the most handsome, beautiful, pretty, gorgeous, charismatic, enchanting, fascinating, interesting, attractive, alluring, charming, appealing, exquisite, radiant, and stunning guy in the whole world. Man, I wish I was that guy.
 Ophelia Pane
She, uh, I didn't really think much about this character I don't have anything funny to say.
Emma Roid
The captain of the cheerleading squad. She is also the only member of the cheerleading squad. Nobody likes her.
Lon Moore
Isn't in the game.

GAME FEATURES
~20 minutes of gameplay
Walking (to the left AND right)
Poorly written dialogue
Music that doesn't fit the tone
Ghost murder

CREDITS
All music, art, and programing done by me.
ALSO credit to SideMV's RPGmaker side scroller tutorials, without that I wouldn't have been able to figure any of this out.
You know what, shoutout to SomeRanDev's RPGmaker tutorials as well, wouldn't know how to use the engine in the first place without that.
Shoutout to my dog too, he a real one.

performance

game.short_text: Experimental 3D platformer with turn-based combat and a bit of charm
game.title: PRINTTOWN!

details.title: PRINTTOWN!
details.description:
Companies buying out every billboard in town? We've got a simple solution for you: vandalism! With vandalism, you're sure to bring trouble to those pesky businesses looking to earn money with their fancy new AI-powered technology that will completely, 100%, without a shadow of a doubt revolutionize the way you live!

the gameplay
In this interactive experience, your main goal is to reach the top of the highest building in town using some... unique methods. The main gameplay consists of parkouring on top of buildings, collecting treats and fighting stray animals.
don't worry, you don't actually kick the poor guy if you win. he simply gets disappointed.



the controls
ACTIONKEYSWALKWASDRUNshiftJUMPspaceINTERACTleft mouse buttonWAVE :)FTALKspace / left mouse buttonPAUSEescapeSKIP TEXT (use if you don't want to read dialogue)Q
NOTE: there is no controller support!

game.short_text: find your possum in the depths of the universe
game.title: OPOSSESSION

details.title: OPOSSESSION
details.description:
●  Year 4102  ●
"humanity has reached unparalleled heights of advancement, traversing the vast expanses of space and establishing settlements across the cosmos. With a staggering population of 400 quadrillion souls, our species has become ubiquitous throughout the universe. This era of evolution has heralded the emergence of novel technologies and occupations, among them the enigmatic profession of Mailmans.

These individuals navigate the expanse of the cosmos aboard spaceships reminiscent of delivery boxes, ferrying parcels and missives across the boundless reaches of space. Yet, amidst this sea of interstellar couriers, there exists a singular figure who stands apart.

A Mailman unlike any other, accompanied not by mere machinery, but by an unconventional companion—a pet opossum named BOB. "


                                                         
* Click on Images to see in HD *
●  Adventure Survival  ●
Embark on an adventure in search of your pet, who this time ended up in a very far and very dangerous place.

CONTROLS:WASD: MovementX: InteractMouse: Aim & Skip Dialogue

Game idea "Aberration well — is a sinister place, where you appear accidental. Through unknown reason, the only way to move forward is sleep, which reassembled well into new shapes. 
You have to find food, to continue to live, and maybe find the way out. However, dangerous are always near."Find pack of food, back to base, sleep, repeat.
There are 4 levels in total, each with unique puzzles, but since I'm focusing on the atmosphere of the game rather than the gameplay, they may lack coolness. It's also best played with headphones on.

game.short_text: Thoroughly inspect the train, as you will be needed to fill out a report later. Be careful, there's no turning back.
game.title: Aberration Express

details.title: Aberration Express
details.description:
ABERRATION EXPRESS

You’ve already signed the papers, so let’s skip the formalities. Your job is simple: monitor the train. Move through each coach, observe everything carefully, and take notes. If something doesn't match, it's an aberration. Once you leave a coach, there's no going back. At the end of each coach, you’ll be filling out a report on what you saw.

Available in English and Portuguese.

If you happen to find a bug, please describe it to me in detail and give me the number in the lower right corner of the "notes.txt", in the terminal screen, it is going to be something like "OS-00000". This number will help me reproduce the bug and investigate further.
Feel free to leave feedback, it helps me a lot.

game.short_text: DROWN IN DISTORTION. LIVE IN HARMONIC ABERRATION.
game.title: MIX.

details.title: MIX.
details.description:
DROWN IN DISTORTION. LIVE IN HARMONIC ABERRATION.
Three bands have asked you to be their stand-in live sound engineer for a basement rave tonight. The venue is equipped with an unreasonably fancy digital mixing and effects console from a few galaxies over. It's got buttons and dials made of stuff you've never seen before, with many different flavors of distortion. You better get to studying the manual before sound check starts!
Play through three wacky alien songs where YOU are in control of the sound. Real time audio processing and effects were achieved with Csound. Csound integrates with Unity using Rory Walsh's amazing CsoundUnity package. 
Harmonic aberration is sometimes unwanted in digital signal processing, but these alien rave-rats can't get enough of it. It's up to you to provide them with the auditory distortion they crave.

MOUSE ONLY CONTROLS:
INTERACT - [LEFT MOUSE BUTTON]
CANCEL/GO BACK -  [RIGHT MOUSE BUTTON]
[LEFT MOUSE BUTTON] on the show note you're currently viewing activates the band's set.
[RIGHT MOUSE BUTTON] without further context exits to menu.

GitHub 
I conceptualized and created this game and all assets within the 2-week time frame of Acerola Jam 0 with the exception of:
FONT

This project was made in my spare time over a little more than one week for the Acerola Jam 0
Join Dominic Torpedo in his quest to save his family trapped in badly styled HTML.Note: Minimal technical knowledge required to play the game.Note2: Music is off by default for a reason.
By the way, look here's a bridge:Lemme fix that for you real quick:
There, good as new.
Some things in the game need to be clicked so it's best if you have a mouse.

This game is open source:https://github.com/abam-iksde/acerola-jam0

For those who found this game by chance:The theme of the jam was "Aberration" - my interpretation brought me to making a game in JS using HTML elements which normally can be found in browser forms rather than in a video game.One of the rules of the jam was its team size limit of 1 person. I'm a programmer, but I also happen to be an artist, a performance artist, and this is my performance.That's why the game looks and sounds like this.

game.short_text: Harvest angry plants while dodging their attacks
game.title: Hexed Harvest

details.title: Hexed Harvest
details.description:
Our brothers have developed a spell that allows us to grow large quantities of food in short time. It's your job to harvest those crops and bring them to the deposit boxes, but be quick! The spell has an unwelcome side effect!
Once mature, the plants quickly turn violent, but are also worth more. It's up to you whether to safely harvest them early or risk earning more by letting them turn.
Controls:
Use WASD or arrow keys to move.
Hold Shift to sprint, but only when not carrying a plant.
Use Space to pick up, deposit, and toss plants.
Tips:
- Getting hit causes you to drop your held plant.
- Some plants will cancel their attack when picked up.
- You get points for time survived, so don't be afraid to run for safety if things get dangerous.
- Sometimes it's better to quickly pick and toss multiple corrupted plants to reduce the volume of enemy attacks rather than trying to deposit every single one.

game.short_text: Sacrifice your enemies to your goddess.
game.title: Hand of Sarkatha

details.title: Hand of Sarkatha
details.description:
Hand of the Sarkatha is a game where you control a hand given by your god in order to build a flesh form for her.
The surrounding factions are none too happy about the news of this and send armies to try and stop you.

Build traps and defenses to fight back against the hordes.
Take their flesh and put it to use.

Sarkatha will be born.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PLEASE READ (I didn't get to make a tutorial)Stab bodies to get resources.
Use the crafting menu to combine those resources into defenses .The only resources that are detected for crafting are those inside the center square of the menu.
The various Turrets (Spitter, Chulker, Ballista) serve the purpose  of freeing your attention to avoid getting overwhelmed.
It is easy to get overwhelmed but experimentation is the key to survival.
If you struggle try crafting Sacrificial Dagger -> Meatball -> Orb-> Plates->Spitter.
CONTROLS:
F:  FullscreenR :  Restart
Left Mouse Button:  Pick up
Right Mouse Button : Navigate
Middle Mouse button :  Craft
Scroll Wheel :  Navigate Crafting Menu 
[Click center to confirm craft]
[Click Materials and Creature buttons on the left side of the menu to change Categories and ]
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Dev notes: I really enjoyed making this! Though I had a 5 day time constraint I think I ended up with something rather complete and fun to play.There's a lot extra that didn't make it into the game so I definitely wanna expand on it post jam.
Thanks for playing!

game.short_text: A real-time infestation simulation where you control a swarm of plants and evolve them over time
game.title: Viridis Infaction

details.title: Viridis Infaction
details.description:
Build a plant colony in this real-time strategy game. Evolve your plants and ward off invading species... but be sure to avoid undesirable mutations. Read the description for controls and tips. There are objectives to complete levels but the game is primarily intended as a casual sandbox.
Gameplay
[WASD] or [RMB+Drag] Let's you move the camera around.
Select a tile with [LMB]. Slow down Time with [SPACE]
Grow Your infection by cloning your first plant. Select it with LMB and wait for it to finish growing and maturing. You can autoselect the nearest matured plant by pressing [TAB].
Press Clone once it's finished maturing. It will shoot off a new seed and attempt to sail in the direction of your pheromone trace. You can move the pheromone trace around with [MMB], or select the desired tile and press [SHIFT].
When the cloned sibling spawns in, it will have slightly mutated traits. Try to specialize traits through selective breeding in order to evolve new species!
If you are unhappy with a sample of foliage, you may mulch it to create goop on the tile. Goop gives a mutation boost to plants that spawn onto it.
The map has five beacons. Grow over them all to progress to the next level.
Not all mutations are desirable, even loyalty can eventually be bred out of a plant.
Genetic traits:
The traits you are provided with are as follows:

Agression:  Ability to overtake tiles occupied by enemies
Defense: Ability to ward off invading species
Growth rate: Speed at which plant establishes itself
Health: Ability to not die
Reproductivity: Speed at which a plant can develop seeds or send off runners
Seed Range: How far the seeds can fly
Subservience: Your plant's loyalty... or its likelihood of committing mutiny...

Species
Stink Plant: Mutates from plants with strong aggression. Damages hostile organisms around it
Barbed Vine: Mutates from plants with strong defense. Resistant to hostile takeover. Grows into 
Carpet Weeds: Mutates from plants with strong growth. Grows in quickly to cover space
Healing Vera: Mutates from plants with strong health. heals plants around it
Pitcher plant: Mutates from plants with strong reproductive. Gives surrounding plants a growth boostDandy Launcher: Mutates from plants with strong seed range. Shoots seeds farLike-Me-Nots: Mutates from plants with weak subservience. Spreads fast and attempts overtaking youFlesh Invader: ???Machine Plant: ???
Made for Acerola Game Jam 0. I wanted to work in the theme aberration through mutations and evolution. The simple shrubs can be selectively bred to specialize into different traits. There's so much more I would like to do with the complexity, intuity, and player agency in this simulation that will end up turning this into a more long-term project.

details.description:
A menu puzzler created for Acerola Jam 0. The theme is "aberration," defined as "a departure from what is normal, usual, or expected, typically one that is unwelcome." So I hope you enjoy this totally normal game with a totally usual menu with buttons that work in a totally expected way.

game.short_text: A Mind Melting Game With Unique Graphics
game.title: Noise Shift

details.title: Noise Shift
details.description:
EPILEPSY WARNING - This Game Is ENTIRELY Flashing Lights
Also, of course it turned out glitched and the "You Won" screen shows up early. Just my luck.
This game, built for Acerola Jam 0, uses a unique graphic and audio system to create it's previously unseen experience. Screenshots physically cannot do this game justice,
The rendering works by replacing the color value of a pixel with a chance to change the previous frame's pixel. With multiple color schemes and several unique materials, the graphics are made to wow. Make sure to pause often and admire the chaos of the view!
The audio is entirely generated on the fly. It doesn't even use samples,  just adding together various waves to form this unique experience. It looks at the situation in the world and decides what notes, and at which volumes, it should play. Be sure to leave it on, because if you listen close the music can warn you when enemies are near.
Check the Devlog for a detailed explanation of many choices!

WASD to move
Mouse to look around
E to clear screen
Tab to pause/unpause
